untranslatable_reason: Signal requires 'news sentiment' and 'news direction' data which are not available in the allowed indicators list. The core logic of price-vs-news divergence cannot be expressed using only technical indicators (price, volume, moving averages, RSI, ATR, Bollinger Bands, MACD, ADX, Stochastic, Donchian, Pivots, volume ratios). News sentiment would require external data feeds not in the technical indicator universe.
translation_notes: Attempted to capture the 'price moves opposite to direction' concept using price action reversals and volume confirmation, but this loses the critical news sentiment component. A proper implementation would require integration of external news sentiment data or a separate sentiment indicator not available in the standard technical toolkit.
